  "text": "The XPCOM component implementation follows patterns from Firefox's xpcom/ds/nsObserverService.h and nsObserverService.cpp. The header (nsMyObserverService.h) declares the class nsMyObserverService which inherits from nsIObserverService and uses NS_DECL_ISUPPORTS (from nsISupportsImpl.h) to declare the QueryInterface, AddRef, and Release methods, and NS_DECL_NSIOBSERVERSERVICE (generated from xpcom/ds/nsIObserverService.idl) to declare AddObserver, RemoveObserver, NotifyObservers, and EnumerateObservers. The implementation (nsMyObserverService.cpp) uses NS_IMPL_ISUPPORTS to provide the reference-counted QueryInterface, AddRef, and Release implementations, following the same pattern as nsObserverService.cpp. Component registration uses NS_GENERIC_FACTORY_CONSTRUCTOR (defined in xpcom/components/ModuleUtils.h), which generates a constructor function that allocates the class with 'new' and calls QueryInterface. The Module registration table pattern follows toolkit/components/build/nsToolkitCompsModule.cpp and uses NS_DEFINE_NAMED_CID together with mozilla::Module::CIDEntry and ContractIDEntry arrays. A unique CID and contract ID (NS_MYOBSERVERSERVICE_CID / @mozilla.org/my-observer-service;1) identify the component in XPCOM's component registry."
}
